title: Build a deterministic field-release QA evidence harness
body:
## Context
Build deterministic field-release evidence.

## Dependencies
- Parent: #2

## Ownership Surface
- `test/e2e/field-release.spec.ts`
- `scripts/validate-field-evidence.ts`
- `docs/operations/field-qa.md`
- `playwright.config.ts`
- `package.json`

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] The evidence flow is deterministic.

## Tests/Evals
- A forbidden request fails the harness.

## Verification
```bash
npm run verify
```

## Agent Instructions
- Keep the lane scoped.

## Human Checkpoints
- A maintainer reviews the evidence.

## Out of Scope
- Deployment.
